blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
